parameters.content:
## UTIL__BackupWorkflows
Manual-export backup for n8n plans without API access.

How to use:
- In n8n, manually export workflows as JSON
- Upload the export JSON to the watched Google Drive folder
- This workflow parses the export and backs up each workflow to GitHub

Before activating:
- Replace YOUR_N8N_EXPORTS_FOLDER_ID with the Google Drive folder ID
- Replace owner your-username with the real GitHub owner
- Create GitHub API credential named GitHub Backups
